name: Fortuna Mining Corp.
description: Fortuna Mining Corp. (formerly Fortuna Silver Mines Inc.) is a diversified precious metals producer operating five mines across Côte d'Ivoire (Seguela), Argentina (Lindero), Burkina Faso (Yaramoko), Mexico (San Jose), and Peru (Caylloma). The company rebranded from silver to gold focus in 2024 reflecting its evolution toward gold-dominant production, generating $947 million in 2025 revenue, a 40% year-over-year increase. Fortuna is focused on organic growth and exploration across its global multi-jurisdiction portfolio.
